# Aisle angle rotated 30° under the abstract-grid stamp. Exercises
# per-region frame rotation and the canvas-anchored origin — the grid
# stays aligned to world (0,0) regardless of angle, so rotating the
# aisle angle rotates where the interior lines land.

polygon outer
0,0
300,0
300,200
0,200
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set aisle_angle_deg=30
----
set aisle_angle_deg=30

debug use_abstract_stamp=true
----
debug use_abstract_stamp=true

generate
----
total_stalls: 173

screenshot
----
